positive: A central, symmetrical composition featuring a mystical forest gateway overgrown with glowing bioluminescent flora and intricate, stylized Celtic knotwork vines. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau and woodcut etching, rendered with stark black lines and deep emerald and sapphire accents. Focus on bold, clean silhouettes and negative space. The atmosphere is serene and mysterious, illuminated by soft, magical glows emanating from the plants. Highly detailed, suitable for repeat pattern or large central print. High contrast, volumetric lighting, fantasy concept art, vector illustration quality.
